titles.title: A bill to amend title 18, United States Code, to prohibit certain aliens from presenting or using a commercial driver's license in interstate or foreign commerce, and for other purposes.
A bill to amend title 18, United States Code, to prohibit certain aliens from presenting or using a commercial driver's license in interstate or foreign commerce, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary.
